synthetics.canary.basescreenshot.CfnAbou: A structure representing a screenshot that is used as a baseline during visual monitoring comparisons made by the canary.

synthetics.canary.basescreenshot.IgnoreC.Description: Coordinates that define the part of a screen to ignore during screenshot comparisons. To obtain the coordinates to use here, use the CloudWatch Logs console to draw the boundaries on the screen. For more information, see {LINK}

synthetics.canary.basescreenshot.Screens.Description: The name of the screenshot. This is generated the first time the canary is run after the `UpdateCanary` operation that specified for this canary to perform visual monitoring.
